query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: Luminous white and violet trails form overlapping curved and circular patterns against a near-black background, with vivid red linear streaks sweeping from the upper left toward the center and a narrow horizontal band of warm light visible near the lower right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Extreme underexposure and motion blur render luminous white and violet light trails as overlapping circular shapes against crushed black shadows, with vivid red streaks sweeping from the upper left, creating an abstract composition that abandons representational clarity and evokes atmospheric unease through its ghostly, indeterminate forms.
